changes.message: Ability and agent tiles now show clear hover labels while browsing, dragging, deleting, or selecting lineup items on the map.
Added real ability names for every agent so hover labels and placed ability details use the actual in-game names instead of generic ability numbers.
Added registry-backed folder icons so folders can use bundled agent role image icons.
Migrated folder icon persistence and archive metadata to stable icon ids with legacy IconData compatibility.
Corrected several ability range measurements, including Killjoy radius conversions, so map previews better match their intended gameplay ranges.
